name: 数字与运算符
description: Numbers, arithmetic operators, division, floor division, modulo, powers, and assignment.
learning_objective: Predict numeric expression results and distinguish /, //, %, and **.

name: 文本与字符串
description: String literals, escaping, raw strings, concatenation, repetition, indexing, slicing, and len().
learning_objective: Use string syntax, indexing, slicing, and immutability correctly.

name: 序列索引与切片
description: Zero-based indexes, negative indexes, inclusive start and exclusive end slices.
learning_objective: Predict sequence indexing and slicing results.

name: 列表基础
description: List literals, indexing, slicing, append(), nesting, and list mutability.
learning_objective: Use and modify lists while distinguishing list values from list references.

name: 赋值与可变性
description: Assignment binds names to objects; mutating a shared list is visible through aliases.
learning_objective: Explain aliasing and mutation effects after assignment.

name: if 条件分支
description: if, elif, else, boolean tests, comparison operators, and indentation blocks.
learning_objective: Trace conditional execution and choose the branch that runs.

name: for 与 range()
description: for loops, range(start, stop, step), and loop variable behavior.
learning_objective: Predict iterations produced by range() and for loops.

name: 循环控制
description: break, continue, loop else clauses, and pass.
learning_objective: Trace how break, continue, and loop else affect control flow.

name: 函数定义
description: def, return, local variables, docstrings, and function calls.
learning_objective: Define functions and predict return values.

name: 函数参数
description: Default values, keyword arguments, special parameters, *args, **kwargs, unpacking, lambdas, and annotations.
learning_objective: Reason about argument binding and common default-argument pitfalls.

name: 列表方法
description: append, extend, insert, remove, pop, clear, index, count, sort, reverse, copy, and method return values.
learning_objective: Choose list methods and predict their side effects.

name: 列表推导式
description: List comprehensions, nested comprehensions, filters, and expression order.
learning_objective: Translate between loops and comprehensions.

name: 元组与序列
description: Tuples, sequence packing/unpacking, immutability, and del.
learning_objective: Use tuple packing/unpacking and sequence operations correctly.

name: 集合与字典
description: Sets, dictionaries, membership, key-value access, dictionary construction, and dictionary methods.
learning_objective: Use sets and dictionaries for membership and mapping tasks.

name: 循环技巧与条件
description: items(), enumerate(), zip(), sorted(), reversed(), boolean operators, and sequence comparison.
learning_objective: Select idiomatic looping techniques and evaluate compound conditions.

name: 模块导入
description: Modules, import, from import, module namespaces, and attribute access.
learning_objective: Import modules and access module-level names correctly.

name: 模块脚本执行
description: Executing modules as scripts and the __name__ == '__main__' idiom.
learning_objective: Explain when script-only code runs.

name: 模块搜索路径
description: sys.path, current directory, PYTHONPATH, installation defaults, and compiled Python files.
learning_objective: Reason about how Python finds imported modules.

name: dir() 与命名空间查看
description: Using dir() to inspect module names and understanding imported names.
learning_objective: Inspect available names without confusing modules and attributes.

name: 包与相对导入
description: Packages, submodules, __init__.py, importing from packages, and relative imports.
learning_objective: Identify valid package import patterns.

name: 格式化输出
description: Formatted string literals, str.format(), format specifiers, and alignment.
learning_objective: Use f-strings and format specifiers to produce expected strings.

name: str() 与 repr()
description: Human-readable str() and interpreter-oriented repr().
learning_objective: Choose str() or repr() for the intended representation.

name: 文件打开模式
description: open(filename, mode, encoding), text versus binary mode, r/w/a/r+ modes.
learning_objective: Select correct file modes and encoding handling.

name: with 管理文件
description: Context managers for files, automatic closing, read(), readline(), iteration, write(), tell(), and seek().
learning_objective: Use with open(...) safely and predict file object behavior.

name: JSON 结构化数据
description: Saving structured data with json.dump(), json.dumps(), json.load(), and json.loads().
learning_objective: Serialize and deserialize simple Python data structures as JSON.

name: 语法错误与异常
description: SyntaxError versus runtime exceptions and traceback interpretation.
learning_objective: Distinguish syntax errors from exceptions.

name: 异常捕获
description: try, except, else, exception matching, and exception objects.
learning_objective: Trace exception handling flow and choose appropriate except clauses.

name: 抛出异常
description: raise, re-raising, exception chaining, and exception notes.
learning_objective: Raise and propagate exceptions intentionally.

name: 清理动作
description: finally blocks and predefined cleanup actions such as with statements.
learning_objective: Predict cleanup execution in normal and exceptional paths.

name: 自定义异常
description: User-defined exception classes and exception hierarchy design.
learning_objective: Define simple custom exceptions when domain errors need names.

name: 命名空间与作用域
description: Namespaces, scopes, local/nonlocal/global lookup, and name binding.
learning_objective: Reason about where names are looked up and rebound.

name: 类定义与类对象
description: class syntax, class objects, attribute references, and instantiation.
learning_objective: Define simple classes and identify class attributes.

name: 实例与方法
description: Instance attributes, method binding, self, and method objects.
learning_objective: Explain how method calls bind self and mutate instance state.

name: 类变量与实例变量
description: Class variables, instance variables, shared mutable class attributes, and initialization.
learning_objective: Distinguish shared class state from per-instance state.

name: 继承与方法查找
description: Inheritance, overriding, isinstance(), issubclass(), multiple inheritance, and method lookup.
learning_objective: Predict inherited method and attribute lookup behavior.
